markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 27, 2026 10 PM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 80.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 80.99° on Jun 27, 2026 at 10pm EDT?

markets.rules_primary: If Uzbekistan records above 3.5 goals in the Congo DR vs Uzbekistan professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 27, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to Uzbekistan in the Congo DR vs Uzbekistan professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 27, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties). Own goals count towards the team awarded the goal.
markets.title: Will Uzbekistan score over 3.5 goals?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Monique Billings records 15+ points in the Los Angeles vs Indiana women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jun 27, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the Los Angeles vs Indiana women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jun 27, 2026. If a player is active but never takes the court, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game the market settles based on the player's points recorded.
markets.title: Monique Billings: 15+ points

markets.rules_primary: If the simple average of the sixty seconds of CF Benchmarks' BNBUSDRTI before 12:15 AM EDT on Jun 28, 2026 is at least the simple average of the sixty seconds of CF Benchmarks' BNBUSDRTI before 12:00 AM EDT on June 28, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Not all cryptocurrency price data is the same. While checking a source like Google or Coinbase may help guide your decision, the price used to determine this market is based on CF Benchmarks' corresponding Real Time Index (RTI). At the last minute before expiration, 60 RTI prices are collected. The official and final value is the average of these prices, rounded to the nearest 2 decimal places.
markets.title: BNB price up in next 15 mins?
